title: Suhaag
subTitle: College friends Ajay and Raj always play pranks on each other and then get into trouble. One day, Ajay needs his birth certificate for his passport, but he is shocked to find out his real name.

title: Naina
subTitle: After years of blindness caused by an accident, Naina gets a successful cornea transplant. However, she soon begins to see terrifying visions that prompt her to investigate the source of her sight.

title: Bal Ganesh And Friends From Zeba V- 2018
subTitle: Bal Ganesh and his devotees, Topi, Dhoti and Suit-Boot travel to the planet of Zeba, experiencing adventures and creating unforgettable memories.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Kartoos
subTitle: ACP Jay Suryavanshi assigns an inmate on death row, Jeet, the task of killing Jagat, a terrorist. Things take a turn when Jeet falls in love with Mini and gets distracted from his mission.

title: Aatank
subTitle: Conflict ensues in a seaside town after two orphans stumble upon a trove of priceless pearls. The revelation leads to the discovery of a ferocious man-eating shark hunting in their vicinity.

title: Bhoothnath
subTitle: When a mischievous ghost returns to his ancestral home, chaos unfolds with both humor and heart as he tries to protect his family and teach valuable lessons to the living.

title: Jai Vikraanta
subTitle: When a poor, honest farmer from rural India is killed by a greedy landlord, his son, Vikraanta, takes a vow to avenge his murder.

title: Haqeeqat
subTitle: Shiva changes his name to Ajay as he leaves his criminal life after saving a police officer and his family. He falls in love with a widow and marries her, but his past comes back to haunt him.

title: Dil Hai Tumhaara
subTitle: Sarita raises Shalu, her spouse's love child, and her daughter, Nimmi, but she does not forgive Shalu's past. When she discovers that Shalu is growing close to Nimmi's lover, things become worse.

title: The Burning Train
subTitle: Vinod, a railway engineer, launches the Super Express, a dream project that is India's fastest passenger train. However, it goes out of control on its maiden journey due to a bomb planted by a rival.

title: The Burning Train
subTitle: Vinod, a railway engineer, launches the Super Express, a dream project that is India's fastest passenger train. However, it goes out of control on its maiden journey due to a bomb planted by a rival.

title: Vaada Raha...I Promise
subTitle: Duke Chawla leads a perfect life with a good job and a beautiful girlfriend. However, when he meets with an accident, his life changes forever.

title: Gair Kaanooni
subTitle: Police Inspector Kapil Khanna realises that his baby boy has been switched with a girl child by the hospital and files a lawsuit against the owner, Robert Decosta while trying to find his missing son.

title: Darna Mana Hai
subTitle: Six friends relate spooky tales to one another while stranded on a highway. Each story turns out to be scarier than the next one but the biggest horror strikes when some of the friends go missing.

title: Humraaz
subTitle: A wealthy Raj Singhania begins an affair with Priya, an entertainer who already has a boyfriend. While they start their relationship, Priya's lover decides to get his revenge on them.

title: Meri Jung
subTitle: Deepak Verma lives happily with his family, but things change when he is prosecuted by Thakral for murder. His son, Arun, vows to exact revenge against Thakral and prove his father's innocence.

title: Ab Ke Baras
subTitle: Anjali comes to India to investigate recurring visions of her past life in her dreams. Later, she meets a thief who might have been her lover in another lifetime.

title: Ab Insaf Hoga
subTitle: A woman's life takes a challenging turn when her husband becomes paralysed for life right after their wedding.

title: Dostana
subTitle: Sam and Kunal pretend to be a gay couple in order to share an apartment in Miami with Neha. However, their plan gets complicated when both of them fall in love with her.

title: Dostana
subTitle: Sam and Kunal pretend to be a gay couple in order to share an apartment in Miami with Neha. However, their plan gets complicated when both of them fall in love with her.

title: Aladdin
subTitle: In the heart of an enchanted city, an Arabian thief finds a magic lamp with a genie inside and tries to win a princess's heart by saving her from the schemes of an evil sorcerer.

title: Auzaar
subTitle: Suraj, a police officer, is assigned to arrest his friend Yash, whose father runs an illegal business. He must now persuade his friend to make his father change his ways to avoid the consequences.

title: Colors Cineplex Bollywood
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Tumko Na Bhool Paayenge
subTitle: Veer, a villager, becomes restless after he is haunted by the visions of his past. When he is attacked on the day of his wedding, he forces his parents to reveal the truth about his identity.

title: Jaal
subTitle: Fate plays a cruel game when Shankar gets hired by a rich woman named Amita who bears an uncanny resemblance with Meenabai, the person who breaks his family apart.

title: Ghar Ghar Ki Kahani
subTitle: Ram begins to suspect that his wife, Seeta, is having an affair with his brother, Amar. His suspicion remains even after Amar gets married, creating problems within his family.

title: Welcome
subTitle: Two thugs meet Rajiv, who belongs to a respectable family, and want to fix their sister's wedding with him. However, when Rajiv's uncle refuses to the match, a series of hilarious situations occur.

title: Baghban
subTitle: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

title: Vinashak
subTitle: A diligent and determined police officer is tasked with uncovering the truth behind a crooked warden involved in illicit weapon trafficking.
